title: Beautify: ReFoxed
description: Adds lots of vanilla-styled ways to spice up your builds.
body: # Beautify: ReFoxed [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/beautify-refoxed?color=00AF5C&label=downloads&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refoxed) [![](http://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_1446138_downloads.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/beautify-refoxed) [![Minecraft Versions](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/1446138.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/beautify-refoxed) #### This mod is maintained as the [original author](https://modrinth.com/user/Pandarix) has not updated it for over a year. It will be discontinued once the original author resumes updates. #### Ported from my [fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refabricated) version, it has minor detail differences from the [original](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify). This is the Unofficial NeoForge version of [Beautify](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify), licensed under [MIT](https://github.com/Pandarix/Beautify/blob/main/LICENSE), please support the original work! ![ ](https://i.imgur.com/tDSBihU.jpg.png) ![ ](https://i.imgur.com/aVn4B6m.gif) What is Beautify? - Beautify is a client and serverside deco-mod that adds lots of vanilla-styled ways to spice up your builds with custom models. - My goal with this mod is to increase the detail in builds without killing the need for imagination and creativity. - Additionally, most blocks include new features. For example, potted plants (such as 1 tall flowers) can be duplicated using bone meal. More Pictures: ![ ](https://i.imgur.com/7wHu3qe.png) ![ ](https://i.imgur.com/LGUotre.png) ![ ](https://i.imgur.com/M7AfS0o.png?1) ![ ](https://i.imgur.com/63BR9j4.png) - [more example images](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/beautify-refabricated/screenshots) Showcase Video by Jeikir: [![](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/5uXGHUit038/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5uXGHUit038 "") Features summary: - Hanging Pots with custom flower models and a wide variety of supported plants - Book Stacks with different models that can power an enchantment table - Blinds to add details to your windows or create new types of entrances - Picture Frames with all 16x16 Vanilla Painting motives and more - Rope that Hanging Pots and other Blocks can be attached to and Players can climb - New forms of light sources: Bamboo Lantern, Candelabras/ Chandeliers, Glowessence Jar, Light Bulbs - Lattices for putting plants on walls and ceilings - more coming soon For more info on the blocks and their uses, please [visit the wiki!](https://github.com/Pandarix/Beautify/wiki)
